amplified

Practical observations and applied frameworks for teams putting AI to work in the enterprise.

Explore Use Cases Browse Guides

IA = Intelligence Amplification. AI embedded in your workflow to take care of the routine, highlight what matters, and create space for higher‑value work.

Explore real scenarios, walkthroughs, and curated updates to help you translate AI into practical value in your day-to-day work.
